story.text:
# 💡 Merge Catastrophe
**concept** · shared · knowledge

If the Moon returned to Earth, everything would end. Not metaphor — orbital mechanics. The Swordsman returning to the Master is annihilation. The deepest argument against single-agent architectures.
> *The Moon cannot come home. The Swordsman cannot share state with the Mage. The orbit is the trust.*
